rationale: The cited paper appears only in the concluding limitations/future research discussion, where the authors note that models of temporal cherry-picking could extend prior dynamic structural consumer-choice work (e.g., Sun, Neslin, and Srinivasan 2003). In the main conceptual framework, empirical models, and results, this citation is not used to build hypotheses, define measures, or justify estimation choices. Its role is a generic literature pointer rather than a paper-specific building block for this study.
